configurations.name: dashboard_scan
runtimeArgs: DASHBOARD_PASSWORD='' exec venv/bin/streamlit run src/delivery/dashboard.py --server.port 8506 --server.headless true --server.runOnSave false

configurations.name: wc_preview
configurations.comment: Sources .env for API keys but forces the LOCAL SQLite DB (BETVECTOR_FORCE_LOCAL_DB=1) so UI previews never burn Neon data-transfer. NOTE: local WC data can be staler than Neon. To preview against live Neon data, drop BETVECTOR_FORCE_LOCAL_DB.
runtimeArgs: set -a; . ./.env; set +a; BETVECTOR_FORCE_LOCAL_DB=1 DASHBOARD_PASSWORD='' exec venv/bin/streamlit run src/delivery/dashboard.py --server.port 8507 --server.headless true --server.runOnSave false
